name: Toasted Sunflower Seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Mix sunflower seeds with oil if salt is used.
3. Spread plain or oiled seeds on a baking sheet.
4. Bake for about 8 minutes, or until lightly browned. Watch carefully as the seeds will brown quickly.
5. Sprinkle oiled seeds with salt while hot.
Calories per tablespoon: About 20 with oil, 15 without oil
Source: FOOD -- by U.S. Department of Agriculture
